title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji probably sensed the presence of a strong enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And is stopping them on the third floor...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! Seems like my observation Haki still needs work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Must stay back on this floor as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll create an opening!! Luffy, please go on ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your tricks won't work now!! Damn robot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So you were a dinosaur, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed, just give up already. Dino- sales are the STRONGEST creatures to have ever lived...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: don't worry... there's no escaping from here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey you~ You said you were lovestruck, didn't you?:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UFU~) stay here, with us. I'll make you my pet.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must go, there's somewhere I need to be...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: every- where I look there are...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
